minute.description: Minute field (first). Values 0-59. * means every minute. */5 means every 5 minutes.

hour.description: Hour field (second). Values 0-23. 0 is midnight, 23 is 11 PM.

month.description: Month field (fourth). Values 1-12 or jan-dec abbreviations.

day_of_week.description: Day of week field (fifth). 0 and 7 are Sunday. Or use three-letter abbreviations.

asterisk.description: Wildcard matching every possible value for the field.

step.description: Step value. */5 in the minute field means every 5 minutes.

range.description: Range of values. 1-5 in day-of-week means Monday through Friday.

list.description: Comma-separated list of values. 1,15 in day-of-month means 1st and 15th.

reboot.description: Special schedule that runs once when the cron daemon starts (system boot).

daily.description: Special schedule equivalent to midnight every day.

hourly.description: Special schedule equivalent to the start of every hour.

weekly.description: Special schedule equivalent to midnight every Sunday.

monthly.description: Special schedule equivalent to midnight on the first of every month.

MAILTO.description: Environment variable that controls where cron output is emailed. Set to "" to disable.

PATH.description: The search path for commands. Cron has a minimal default PATH - always set it explicitly.

SHELL.description: The shell used to run commands. Default is /bin/sh.
